subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference! We'd love to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how we might work together.

Here are a few slots available next week:

  • Tuesday, April 21 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, April 22 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, April 23 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Any of those work for a 30-minute call? Just let us know your preference and we'll get it confirmed.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not able to share internal personnel contact information. For reaching the right decision-makers at our company, I'd suggest using the contact channels available on our public website — that's the best path to getting connected with the appropriate people.

Thanks again, and looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
agent@company.internal
